reviews.title: Knock offs!! Just DON'T DO IT ✅
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:e270e5dd29b72c4c1bdeae3b2a3671e1]] They are dirty with red clay mud. Very very poorly made. For $185 I expect more quality. The material is not properly laid. I am a Nike Shox NZ fanatic. I have over 10 pair and clearly  these are knock offs. The Nike swish is smaller then my pinky finger nail. The shocks are not even so the shoe tilts. I will stick to buying in the store that way I know exactly what I am getting. Ohh let me add they charge you to return items. You have to drive to UPS to drop them off and they charge you a fee. I can not make this up the attached pictures do not lie. Do not buy from this seller. Don't do it!!!! Very disappointed 😞 RETURNING!!!!!

reviews.title: My First Pair of Slip On Sneakers
reviews.text:
I own more pairs of shoes right now that at any time in my life. Part of the reason is because I am involved in more activities than I was in the past and I am thus in need of more types of shoes. My desire to diversify further led me to get my feet inside a pair of INZCOU Men's Non-Slip Gym Sneakers.

I’ve owned lots of pairs of sneakers, but this is the first time I have owned sneakers that do not have a tongue. Instead, these shoes are slip- on and that makes them a little easier to put on because you don’t have to reach down and pull the tongue out, like you commonly do with other shoes. Once they are slipped into place, you tie and are ready to go.

These shoes fit about as expected. The only small issue I had was with the arch support in one of the shoes- it seemed a little off and it hurt at first. But after walking around for a while, everything is fine now. And since these are the first pair of black sneakers I have ever owned, they match up nicely with my darker jeans. It’s a welcome change from the white sneakers I usually wear.

It’s good to have a variety of shoes and INZCOU sneakers have proven a good addition to my collection. I will still wear traditional sneakers, the type that doesn’t slip on. But I am happy to add this set of sneakers to my growing supply.

reviews.title: Lightweight and comfortable
reviews.text: Lightweight and comfortable, good for light gym use. Not super durable so I wouldn't take these out train running or anything heavy duty. But for the price they are a good shoe.

title: New Balance Men's 510 V5 Trail Running Shoe
description: Are you looking for a lightweight, durable and supportive pair of trail running shoes? Then your search ends with the New Balance 510v5. Durability on the outside meets responsive comfort inside for a lightweight running shoe that's as ready as you are for a trail run or whatever else your day has in store. Built with a rugged construction, these New Balance trail shoes offer relentless durability that is suitable for various runs both on- and off-road. The lugged outsole on these comfortable running shoes features AT TREAD technology which provides enhanced traction on the trail or the road, while the lightweight injection-molded EVA foam midsole includes both ABZORB technology for impact absorption and an NB Soft + Supportive Insert for memory comfort that lasts. For added protection, the reinforced Toe Protect tip helps protect your toes from rocks, roots and debris so you can go off-road with confidence.
features: 50% Synthetic, 50% Textile
Imported
Rubber sole

Cushioned Running Shoes: ABZORB midsole technology in this runner absorbs impact through a combination of cushioning and compression resistance, and the rubber outsole provides strength and durability
Built-In Off-Road Technology: Toe Protect technology helps protect feet from rocks, roots and debris, while AT Tread on the outsole provides versatile traction during both on- and off-road activities
Plush, Cushioned Running Shoes: These runners feature lightweight injection-molded EVA foam midsoles to provide lightweight cushioning and an NB Soft + Supportive Insert for memory comfort that lasts
Built to Last: With an all-over durable construction and an aggressive lugged outsole, these trail running shoes are designed to stand up to all of your outdoor activities
Athletic Aesthetic: With synthetic and mesh uppers that deliver breathability and a top-quality fit, these running shoes also boast a stylish look to fit in with your active lifestyle

reviews.title: Runs a bit small, but a pretty average shoe, otherwise
reviews.text: I'll keep this pretty short: the shoe is serviceable; that's about it. It's neither particularly comfortable or uncomfortable; it's just a shoe with no outstanding qualities, pretty comparable in quality and feel to the $20 shoes you'd get at "the blue and yellow store". Mine ran on the small side, about a half size under, I would say, but they fit (without cramming my toes in), so I'll use them for outdoor work come spring and summer.

title: 26.2 Marathon Girl Womens Vinyl Sticker Decal Jogging Running Shoes Run Choose Size & Color (V29) (6.25" X 3.75", Blue)
description: This vinyl decal is made of high quality indoor/outdoor rated and proven Oracal 651 vinyl!! -These are perfect for car windows, skateboards, Ipads, etc. (Practically any smooth, clean surface) -A vinyl cut sticker means that there is no background or clear backing. Only the image is the adhesive part! -These are not Cling-ons. -Please apply only to a clean, dry surface. Below are some instructions on how to apply these cool stickers: Step 1 Rub the sticker with a credit card or something with a rigid surface to be sure the transfer tape is properly adhered to the sticker. Step 2 Clean and dry the desired area. Stickers will stick best to clean smooth surfaces. Step 3 Remove the paper backing slowly making sure the sticker stays adhered to the transparent transfer tape Step 4 Carefully position the sticker to the desired area. Once the sticker sticks it will be nearly impossible to reposition without destroying the sticker. Rub the sticker from one side to the other, eliminating any air bubbles. Step 5 Use a hard edged object like a credit card to make sure the entire sticker is fully adhered to the surface. Step 6 Slowly remove the transfer tape. Making sure no part of the sticker remains on the transfer tape. Step 7 Check for air bubbles. In most cases air bubbles can be worked to the edge of the sticker, but if not, a pin hole will allow the air out and become virtually invisible, once the bubble is gone. That’s it! Your sticker is now worry free. It will last through rain, sleet, snow and gentle washing's. You can remove the sticker from glass surfaces with a razor blade or in most cases a fingernail will get the removal process started.
features: 26.2 Marathon Girl Womens Vinyl Sticker Decal
26.2 Marathon Girl Vinyl Sticker

title: Saucony Women's Triumph ISO 4 Running Shoe, Navy/Mint
description:
Ready for the run, anywhere and everywhere. Where the road ends, your run begins in the Cohesion TR11. With a reinforced upper for added protection and added durability and traction to the outsole, the Cohesion TR11 lets you tackle the toughest of trails and beyond, mile after mile.
Saucony is among the most respected names in running shoes. We offer a wide range of running and walking shoes, each with the Saucony trademark fit, feel and performance. We've spent years studying the biomechanics of top athletes. Our goal? To develop creatively engineered systems that maximize your performance in your specific activity, allowing you to focus on the activity instead of the equipment. From our studies have come many innovative Saucony concepts. Advanced technologies-like Grid, the first sole-based stability and cushioning system--provide an advantage to athletes of all types.

Secondly, they feel on the smaller side. I always wear an 8 1/2 in Nike, but then seem a little snug. I loosened the laces and wore them around the house and I guess I will get use to them.
Definately not my favorite pair of shoes, but I hate the hassle of returning in stuff, so will keep them and see how it goes.

reviews.title: Sizing is WAY OFF!
reviews.text: Love the shoe but OMG the sizing is WAY OFF! I have ordered this shoe four times consecutively and each time they run SUPER SMALL. My 10 year old daughter wears a 6.5 and I have had to order a 9 after ordering a 7, 7.5 and an 8.5 and none of those fit her. I will update my review once the 9’s come in. We order shoes every 4-6 months and she loves Nikes but these are made in Vietnam versus her last pair made in India and the sizing couldn’t be more off! See photos!

reviews.title: COMFORT
reviews.text: I LOVE THIS SHOE DUE TO THE FACT I HAD HARDWARE INSTALLED INTO MY RIGHT FOOT BECAUSE MY TOES HAVE COLLAPSED FROM RHEUMATOID ARTHRITIS .... THE ORTHOPEADIC DOCTOR RECOMMEND THIS BRAND ( RUNNING SHOE) SINCE I WORK ON CONCRETE FLOORS ..... THIS SHOE HELPS A GREAT DEAL FOR ME AND I HOPE IT HELPS SOMEONE ELSE GOING THROUGH THE SAME THING .... ALL THESE DIFFERENT KINDS OF GYM SHOES I BOUGHT AND NOTHING WORKS TIL THE DOCTOR RECOMMEND THIS BRAND OF SHOE. I'M NOT GETTING PAID TO SAY THIS, BUT I WILL SAY, IF YOU WERE IN MY POSITION TRYING TO FIND COMFORT AFTER SPENDING $$$$ FOR SEVERAL DIFFERENT TYPES OF GYM SHOES AND SOMEONE RECOMMEND A CERTAIN BRAND COMPARED TO ALL THE $$$$ YOU SPENT PRIOR .... I WISH I COULD GET MY MONEY BACK ON EVERY F*****  SINGLE (18) PAIR OF SHOES I PURCHASED ... FROM NOW ON THIS IS MY ONLY GYM SHOE I'LL WEAR FOR NOW ON.... LOVE THE COMFORT, WIDTH, AND I'M ABLE TO WALK MORE THAN 1 MILE WITHOUT HAVING TO STOP BECAUSE MY FEET ARE HURTING DUE TO THE CHRONIC  (RA) CONDITION LIFE THROWN AT ME.  LOVE LOVE LOVE THESE SHOES

reviews.title: Had to get used to them
reviews.text: I love this brand of Nike. I have been wearing this Nike Zoom Vomero for years. It has changed over the years. This shoe at first seemed to tight. I had to loosen the laces. After warring them for about a month they fit fine. One thing that bothers me is they squeak when I walk.

reviews.text: I went to the nike store to measure the curve of my foot and width prior to purchasing these shoes. I am relatively flatfooted and needed good arch support. These were the most fitting option and they were right! I absolutely love these shoes! Nike didn't have these in store at the time so I purchased online. Absolutely adore these shoes. Perfect color - goes along the black I usually wear on a daily basis to school. I generally wear them all day before and after gym. Love love love them!

reviews.title: Made in China.  As written on the shoes. . . They are "mediocre" but decent overall.
reviews.text:
These are “mediocre” shoes. You know that because written on them is “Just So So”. Why a company would advertise that their shoes are “Just So So”. . . But. . . These shoes are Made in China and being sold by a Chinese company on Amazon. . . So. . . Perhaps it’s a phrase that’s “lost in translation”.

Though you can’t see it perfectly in the pictures. . . The soles of these shoes are see-through. The sole is hard plastic with a non-stop bottom. The uppers are mesh, so they are “airy”. The footbed has nice arch support, which is a bit unusual for Chinese shoes. Nice padding on the footbed, as well as around the ankle.

title: Brooks Women’s Launch 9 Neutral Running Shoe
features: Made in the USA or Imported
Rubber sole

THIS WOMEN’S SHOE IS FOR: The Launch 9 is for neutral runners who want a dependable, lightweight shoe with DNA cushioning and a highly breathable upper that helps runners go fast on every run. We recommend ordering Brooks running shoes 1/2 to one size larger than your dress shoe.
NEUTRAL SUPPORT: Lightweight, streamlined, with even more BioMoGo DNA cushioning, the Launch 9 offers neutral support to keep you running faster mile after mile.
ENHANCED BREATHABILITY: Reengineered upper features Creel Warp mesh, designed to be extremely lightweight and breathable. Hints of reflectivity on the upper to increase visibility on the road.

LIGHTWEIGHT CUSHIONING: We have added more BioMoGo DNA cushioning to the midsole for an even faster ride without the extra weight. A dynamically responsive ride for days when you are working on your speed.
RESPONSIVE TRANSITIONS: Redesigned midsole increased by 2 mm to provide runners with more responsiveness while the Green Rubber Outsole helps your foot move quickly from heel to toe.

title: Salomon Women's Speedcross 3 Trail Running Shoe
description: Salomon was born in 1947 in the heart of the French Alps and the birthplace of modern alpinism. Driven by a passion for skiing and design innovation, Francois Salomon and his son George designed and perfected much of the first modern ski equipment. During the following 60 years, Salomon's commitment to innovative design and passion for mountain sports created a vast range of revolutionary new concepts in boots, skis and apparel and brought innovative solutions to footwear, apparel and equipment for hiking, adventure racing, mountaineering and trail running. Through performance-driven design, Salomon enhances mountain sports by converting new ideas into action and expanding the limits of possibility.

reviews.title: Waited a year of use before my review
reviews.text: To be honest I only bought these shoes from the way they looked (Camo) and only after watching a few viedeos on them.. the price is great.. the comfort is surprising and easy to wear. I weith right at 300 lbs and they support me just fine.. now know I also own Brooks, NB, Adidas, UA HOVR, etc... shoes as well.. are these as comfortable as they are.. No.. but they sure pack a punch bang for the buck thought.. NOW.. One huge issue.;. and again I wanted to wait and see if the soles "scuffed up: for traction.. but no.. If there is rain.. and the water on any surface is thin.. like tile, ocncrete, wood or anything besices most asphalt.. this shoe is like your walking on thin ice.. and YOU WILL SKID! Be warned.. Good.. but Dry use ONLY

reviews.title: Oddly they're a nice shoe
reviews.text: I didn't expect much from these but, they're surprisingly comfortable. They're true to size and the color is pretty neon. The strap around the back is awkward however and I will likely cut it off so it doesn't catch on something when I'm walking. The "just so so" text on the shoe makes no sense... Haha it could easily have been left off... But, again... They're different and bright.

reviews.title: Love these shoes

title: ASICS Gel-Nimbus 19 Lite Show Men's Running Shoe
description: The GEL-Nimbus 19 shoe features our revolutionary FlyteFoam Technology, for optimal comfort and a responsive ride for the neutral runner. A gradient jacquard-mesh upper is strategically tightened or loosened in zones to allow the foot's natural motion. 3D printed overlays provide seamless support to the upper.
features: 100% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
Shaft measures approximately low-top from arch
FlyteFoam Midsole Technology: Continuous cushioning with 50% the weight of traditional EVA.
Fluid Ride Midsole: Fluid Ride provides the ultimate combination of bounce back and cushioning properties with reduced weight and exceptional durability.
Rear foot and Forefoot GEL Cushioning Systems: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
Fluid Fit Upper: ASICS Fluid Fit upper technology combines multi-directional stretch mesh with stretch reinforcements that adapt to the athlete's foot, creating a truly customized glove-like fit.
Heel Clutching System Technology: Exoskeletal heel counter provides improved support and creates improved heel fitting environment.

reviews.title: I don't run, I wear these because I have painful hips and knees.
reviews.text: Greatest shoes out there. I always have bought 1/2 size bigger and have had no problem.

reviews.title: Very nice shoes
reviews.text: The sizing of the shoes are great and they really look good. I am very pleased with this purchase and will be shopping for more soon.

reviews.title: Cute and well made but size was inaccurate.
reviews.text: These seem to be very good quality, especially considering how reasonable they were in price, and are super cute in person!  However, I ordered an 8T and what I received must be a kids 8.  They are huge and will not work for my kiddos this summer as I had hoped.  I'll probably just hang on to them for use down the road, but unfortunately it won't be for awhile! Photo is comparison of this shoe to my kiddos other size 8T tennis shoes we just bought.

reviews.title: Kid & mother approved
reviews.text: My daughter absolutely loves these she says they are very comfortable, they look adorable also and seem to be very well made.

title: JCONGUW Walking Shoes Men's Women's Running Shoes Ultra Lightweight Breathable Walking Shoes Non Slip Athletic Fashion Sneakers Mesh Workout Casual Sports Shoes （Black&White 5.5）

reviews.title: Below Average
reviews.text:
As I took the shoes out of the packaging and examined them, I started laughing. The shoes are advertised on the product page as walking shoes. The label on the front of the tongue says, “Proefssional Sakteobard Shoes”... and yes, the words "professional" and “skateboard” were misspelled. Perhaps this company also makes skateboard shoes and just sewed on the wrong label, but we all got a big chuckle out of it.

At this price point, I didn’t expect much from these shoes. I wear a seven and the shoes fit fine. They are OK to wear around the house, but below average in comfort. The insole is rough and hard, and the soles are very squeaky as you walk.

title: Klitch Footwear Clip Sports Accessory, Hang Extra Shoes Cleats Boots or Gear on Your Bag. Works on Soccer, Baseball, Basketball, Track, Running Shoes, Flip Flops and More.
description: The Klitch is a footwear clip that allows you to hang extra sneakers or cleats to the outside of your bag. This avoids getting the inside of your bag dirty, smelly, and full. Great for anyone who plays sports, works out, or has an active lifestyle. The Klitch can be used for any type of footwear up to 10 lbs!
features: PATENTED: The Klitch Footwear Clip allows you to carry extra shoes outside your bag allowing your shoes to air out and the contents of your bag to stay clean and fresh!
QUICK & EASY: No more messy and difficult knots to tie or untie. Quickly and easily clamp and clip extra shoes or equipment to your bag with no fuss!
PERFECT FOR SPORTS: Great for soccer cleats, football cleats, baseball spikes, basketball shoes, track shoes, hiking boots, flip-flops and much more!
ON THE GO: Great for traveling, hiking, camping or organizing at home. Hang extra shoes or equipment in your garage, lockers, tents or shoe racks!
CUSTOMER FIRST: The Klitch Footwear Clip includes a 1-year full replacement when purchased through Klitch!

reviews.title: Great for Volleyball Shoes
reviews.text:
Absolutly love it ... hold volleyball shoes on the outside of the bag ... if there was an update to the design it would be to make a clip open wide enough so shoes could go heel to heel to keep dirt or elements together.

If you looking for a clip to hold shoes on the outside of the bag -- Look No Further - THIS IS IT!

reviews.title: Does it’s job
reviews.text: This product does the job. No frills but does what it’s designed to do. The clip gets a little hard to open but o actually like it because running throw the airport with muddy sneakers o never worry about them coming loose

reviews.title: Not worth 20 or even 15
reviews.text: Good idea, but the metal clip fell of within 20 uses. This item just isn't made with quality in mind, wish it was!

reviews.title: Great while it lasted!
reviews.text: Worked great for about 5 months.

reviews.title: Cheap junk
reviews.text: The plastic broke after using it 5 or 6 times. Avoid.

title: Saucony Women's Switchback 2 Trail Running Shoe
description: Dialed to grip and rip trails fast. For trail runners looking to get to their destination fast, The lightweight Switchback 2 is a race-ready machine that delivers more of what you need—long-distance cushioning placed into a nimble, grippy, and dialed-in package.
features: Synthetic-and-mesh
Rubber sole
Toothy lugs made of PWRTRAC tacky rubber for grip
New pwrrun+ cushioning is 5% lighter for more protection and flexibility
New sock-like construction featuring a side-set boa lacing system

reviews.title: Love the idea, needs some redesign
reviews.text: I really want to like this shoe more. I do actually use them a lot but it took nearly half a year to really break them in, and they’re still fairly difficult to slip into, as the opening is not very flexible. The shoe itself is tight enough where the laces don’t even really need to be there, and the toe box is fairly narrow which isn’t very good for running and hiking. My pinky toe often feels wedged by this one part of the design and frequently causes pain. I really REALLY like the idea of this shoe though and it’s still wearable for moderate hikes under 2 hours, I just wish they put more work and testing. It’s probably better for people with thinner, narrower feet. My feet are medium wide and the top part is kind of high.

reviews.title: Fits just right
reviews.text: I like the way the shoes fit; however, they are more attractive in the picture than on my feet, at least to me.  They are a little pricey too, but all in all, I would recommend them.

title: WHITIN Men's Max Cushioned Running Shoes | Superior Comfort, Yet Remaining Stability
features: Ethylene Vinyl Acetate sole
Open engineered knit upper offers enhanced breathability and comfort.
Rubberized foam outsole provides long-lasting durability and adequate grip.
Internal heel counter provides lightweight response and lasting durability and support.
Lace-up closure and padded tongue provides locked-in fit and support for neutral runners.
Durable density foam midsole with a lower heel to toe drop provide lightweight and propulsive power.

reviews.title: Buy a Size Larger
reviews.text: This show has a short toe box but with plenty of heel and arch space.  I'm glad that I purchased a 10 instead of a 9.5 .  It is a perfect fit, really supports my knees. Terrific product 😊

reviews.title: Not a running shoe
reviews.text:
Surprising. This is not a road shoe by any stretch of the imagination. I've been switching from heel toe stride to mid foot striker. Not comfortable enough and minimal cushioning
This at best is for walking.
Also tight in the toe box. Kind of surprising. I will not be buying more of these
Also oddly they came in plastic wrap. No box. Cosmetic but just odd

reviews.title: Good stable comfortable shoe
reviews.text: I finally found a show that offers stability comfort and no memory foam! Considering stocking up!

reviews.title: You'll get what you pay for.
reviews.text: Updated: Over the long term, wearing them daily for work...Garbage.

reviews.text: I don't like to write negative reviews but this shoe truly sucks. So cheaply made. Colour was nice though .

reviews.title: Too tight
reviews.text: Bought my sneaker size which is a size that's 1/2 too big and these were too tight. Poorly made.

title: New Balance Men's 410 V6 Trail Running Shoe
description:
Be off-road ready in the New Balance 410v6 men’s trail shoe. Featuring a durable AT Tread rubber outsole, this shoe is fit for any adventure. Made with a sleek upper, ACTEVA midsole technology and a cushioned NB Comfort Insert, the versatile men’s running shoe is designed to keep you comfortable and stylish before, during and after your hike.
New Balance, is dedicated to helping athletes achieve their goals. It's been their mission for more than a century. It's why they don't spend money on celebrity endorsements. They spend it on research and development. It's why they don't design products to fit an image. They design them to fit. New Balance is driven to make the finest shoes for the same reason athletes lace them up: to achieve the very best.
features: 50% Synthetic, 50% Mesh
Imported
Rubber sole
ACTEVA midsole cushioning delivers versatile, flexible support
AT Tread outsole provides versatile traction during both on and off-road activities
Lightweight injection-molded EVA foam midsole provides lightweight cushioning
NB Comfort Insert offers additional cushioning
Synthetic/mesh upper

reviews.title: Sizing
reviews.text: Too narrow

reviews.title: Cheap quality
reviews.text: These are wimpy tennis shoes.  They probably wont' make it a year.  I judge the quality by picking up the shoe and twisting in my hands.  I can easily warp these shoes.  I have some Merrills and I absolutely can't bend them up.

reviews.title: Not the best looking shoe but the most comfortable!
reviews.text: Man my feet hurt. And because I wear the same shoes everyday all day they break down pretty quickly.  These are perfect.  The color isn't my absolute favorite BUT that was the color that was on sale. Besides I'm nearly 50 so I'm not out to impress anyone lol.  They fit my feet perfectly and  there is no better feeling of new shoes when your old shoes broke down! Just enough support.

reviews.title: Great Walking Shoe!
reviews.text: I got these for at home. I like wearing shoes inside. So they need to be clean. I got these, and they are comfy and see like they will last a long time. They should, if I only wear them in my house.

reviews.title: Good fit in a large size
reviews.text: I bought these shoes as a gift for my 25 year old son, who wears a size 16. I know from past experience that New Balance provides a good, consistent fit in their large sizes, and this pair did not disappoint. The fit was great and my son liked the color and style.

title: ASICS Men's Gel-Kayano 26 Running Shoes
description: Celebrate the retro style of the historic Japanese capital in this special edition GEL-KAYANO 26 Retro Tokyo running shoe from ASICS. This updated version combines advanced components with a striking new design that honors Tokyo's heritage. The GEL-KAYANO 26 shoe allows you to tackle long distances in comfort, thanks to the rearfoot GEL technology that's been redesigned for improved shock absorption upon impact. You'll also benefit from a bouncy feel that stems from the FLYTEFOAM Propel midsole technology. The DUOMAX technology in the midsole offers better support and helps resist excessive overpronation while I.G.S. technology promotes smoother propulsion. Additionally, this style is accented with reflective detailing to improve your visibility when running in low light settings. Get the inspiration and support you need to smash your training goals in the special edition GEL-KAYANO 26 Retro Tokyo performance running shoe from ASICS.
features: Synthetic-and-mesh

reviews.title: ASICS Men's Gel-Kayano 26 doesn't work for me
reviews.text:
I really wanted to love these shoes. I bought the Black ones and they looked great. But trying them on was another thing. Under where my toes connect to my feet there is a ridge or slight raised part that I could really feel. From the ridge to the toe of the shoe my toes seemed to slightly drop making the shoe very uncomfortable for me.
I am really glad that I purchased them through Amazon the free return policy worked for me. I sent the shoes back the next morning. The credit showed up the next morning.

reviews.title: Super shoes— my 6th pair!
reviews.text: I get a new pair every year for birthday and absolutely LOVE them ! Great fit, fine look, they seem to get better every year!!!

reviews.title: Asics Kayano
reviews.text: Asics Kayano's are the best!  Lots of support in the heel, and the Duomax support system is awesome!

reviews.title: Update:Tread showing considerable wear after 70 miles
reviews.text:
Two star: Upper is holding up nicely. Tread is already worn out after only 70 miles. I tried ASICS because reviews talk of superior durability. So far for me upper is good, sole is not.

Update: I reached out to ASICS about the tread life. After sending pictures of tread wear after 70 miles they sent code for replacement shoe from ASICS.com.
That’s pretty awesome customer service in my book.

So far 20 miles on new Kayano fit and finish is great.

Comfort on gel-Kayano 28 is far superior to previous models.

Extra wide is a touch narrow but all in all the first 20 miles is running great.

reviews.title: He’ll only wear ASICS
reviews.text: My husband buys one pair of shoes a year (imagine that!). Of course, he wears them every single day—365 days! ASICS are the best fit and most comfortable for him. They’re fit true to size and are just as advertised. He’s very happy!
